items.desc: Teaches a move to a compatible Pokémon. (Gen IV: Rock Climb Gen III: Dive)
List of battle types and their rules.
Holds ten Seals for Poké Balls.
Trade to Cynthia’s grandmother in Celestic Town for HM04 (Surf).
Grants access to Galactic HQ in Veilstone City.
Used to bind Palkia and Dialga.
Given to the trainer’s rival in Jubilife City. Contains Town Maps.
The second of three tickets used to obtain a Pokétch.
The last of three tickets used to obtain a Pokétch.
Grants access to the Team Galactic warehouse in Veilstone City.
Used to heal the Ampharos at the top of Olivine Lighthouse.
Use on Sudowoodo blocking the path on Route 36. Also waters berries.
Summons Groudon to the Embedded Tower.
Summons Kyogre to the Embedded Tower.
Summons Rayquaza to the Embedded Tower.
A tasty tail that sells for a high price.
HS: Allows Kimono-girls to summon Ho-oh. C: Summons Suicune to the Tin Tower.
HS: Opens doors in the Radio Tower. Gen III: Unlocks Silph Co Doors.
HS: Key to the tunnel under Goldenrod City. Gen III: Key to New Mauville.
Trade to Mr. Pokémon for an Exp. Share.
A Poké Doll lost by the Copycat who lives in Saffron City. Trade for a Pass.
Grants access to ride the Magnet Train between Goldenrod City and Saffron City.
Must be replaced in the Power Plant to power the Magnet Train.
Summons Lugia to the Whirl Islands.
Summons Ho-Oh at the top of the Bell Tower.
Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.
Contains mechanical parts to be delivered to Captain Stern.
A letter to Steven from the Devon Corp president.
Trade to Captain Stern for a DeepSeaTooth or DeepSeaScale.
FL: Deliver to Lostelle’s father. RSE: Trade to Professor Cozmo for TM27 (Return).
Unlocks room 1 on the Abandoned Ship.
Unlocks room 2 on the Abandoned Ship.
Unlocks room 4 on the Abandoned Ship.
Unlocks room 6 on the Abandoned Ship.
Trade to Prof. Oak for a Pokédex.
Use to awaken sleeping Pokémon, including Snorlax on roads.
Trade in Cerulean bike shop for a Bicycle.
The Safari Zone Warden’s dentures. Trade for HM04 (Strength).
Operates the elevator in Team Rocket’s Celadon Hideout.
Used to identify the true forms of ghosts in Pokémon Tower.
Grants access to the first three Sevii Islands.
Grants access to all of the Sevii Islands.
Allows access to Navel Rock and Lugia or Ho-oh.
Allows access to Birth Island and Deoxys.
Stores Berry Powder made using a Berry Crusher.
Give to Celio with Sapphire to activate Network Machine and get Rainbow Pass.
Give to Celio with Ruby to activate Network Machine and get Rainbow Pass.
Provides access to the Team Magma Hideout in the Jagged Pass.
Allows access to Faraway Island and Mew. Unreleased outside of Japan.
Return to the museum in Nacrene City.
Summons Reshiram for the final battle against N.
Summons Zekrom for the final battle against N.
Part of a sidequest to obtain tm89.
Part of a sidequest to obtain tm89.
Part of a sidequest to obtain tm89.
Required to progress in the Plasma Frigate.
Appears in the Café Warehouse on Sunday; return to the customer with a Patrat on Thursday.
Wakes up the Crustle blocking the way in Seaside Cave.
Returned to Curtis or Yancy as part of a sidequest.
Unlocks the elevator in Lysandre Labs.
Does nothing, but signifies becoming Champion.
Trade for a Sun Stone in X and Y, or Pidgeotite in Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
Permits entry to the Kalos Power Plant.
Traded to the player’s mom for the Town Map and a Potion.
Unobtainable, but allows the player to change clothes anywhere.
Allows Captain Stern to set out on his expedition.
Unlocks the door to Room 1 in Sea Mauville.
Unlocks the door to Room 2 in Sea Mauville.
Unlocks the door to Room 4 in Sea Mauville.
Unlocks the door to Room 6 in Sea Mauville.
Worn by the player while underwater.
Allows the player to ride Groudon in the Cave of Origin.
Allows the player to ride Kyogre in the Cave of Origin.
Allows the player and their mother to see the star show in the Mossdeep Space Center.
Causes the Meteorite to transform to its final form, allowing Rayquaza to Mega Evolve.
Allows the player to summon a Ride Pokémon.
Evolves Nebby into Solgaleo when used at the Altar of the Sunne.
Evolves Nebby into Lunala when used at the Altar of the Moone.
Unlocks Looker’s motel room on Route 8.
